applies_when: startup-mirror-sync payload passes but token is empty
cross-repo public mirror push is required
do_not_repeat: do not rewrite mirror workflow before checking secret scope
solution_pattern: verify exact repository secret in private source repo
verify fine-grained PAT has Contents read/write to public mirror repo
next_action: Verify ELEMENTARY_PUBLIC_STARTUP_MIRROR_TOKEN as private repo Actions repository secret, then rerun job 86530413883.

symptom_signature: visible native connectors treated as complete capability boundary
applies_when: chat claims a capability is unavailable without checking governed indirect paths
do_not_repeat: do not treat connector visibility as complete capability inventory
solution_pattern: use governed indirect path when available
next_action: Check startup bundle and capability bootstrap before limitation claims.

applies_when: Linux/WSL runner attempts Windows-native executable execution
do_not_repeat: do not call Windows .exe directly from WSL runner job
solution_pattern: or use governed Windows-side service channel
next_action: Route Windows-native operations to github-actions-runner-03-windows or service channel.

applies_when: jobs queue behind unrelated long-running BoCore workflows
do_not_repeat: do not send all jobs to one generic runner lane
solution_pattern: use elementary-ci-fast for fast Linux validations
next_action: Use explicit runner labels and keep ADCP as only control plane.

applies_when: production workflow assumes Node/npm on cPanel
do_not_repeat: do not design production workflows requiring Node/npm on cPanel server
solution_pattern: use external or BoCore runner paths
next_action: Keep production runtime design PHP/Composer compatible; offload Node builds.

applies_when: migration to GitHub-hosted validation runners is proposed
do_not_repeat: do not migrate validation jobs to ubuntu-latest without settings verification
solution_pattern: verify GitHub-hosted availability from repo settings first
next_action: Keep validations on self-hosted lanes unless GitHub-hosted availability is explicitly verified.

do_not_repeat: do not require foreground PowerShell once scheduled task mode is running
solution_pattern: use SYSTEM scheduled task at \ELEMENTARY\GitHub Runner 03 Windows
next_action: Keep scheduled task mode unless later service-mode repair is proven.
